title: Blocky Saplings
description: Saplings that are close to growing up resemble more the fully grown trees!
body:
Minecraft has an block state for saplings named `stage`, which becomes 1 as the sapling grows up. What this pack does is add a custom model for `stage=1` which resembles the tree the sapling will grow into.

This pack has no support for modded trees/saplings. You may create packs for this purpose and release them anywhere, as long as it links back to this pack.
